seoTitle: How to Export All Emails From Outlook to PST
metaDescription: Back up your entire Outlook mailbox by adjusting sync settings for full history and exporting to a PST file using the classic or new Outlook interface.
intro: Whether you're hitting storage limits or switching providers, exporting your full mailbox history protects years of client interactions. This guide covers adjusting your sync slider to capture older mail, then walking through both the classic Import/Export wizard and the newer Outlook export path.

steps.heading: Adjust your sync settings
steps.body: Change your offline slider to "All" so older historical emails are included in your export rather than just recent messages.

steps.heading: Open the Import/Export wizard
steps.body: In the classic interface, open the File menu and launch the Import/Export wizard.

steps.heading: Choose your export format
steps.body: Select "Export to a file" and choose the Outlook Data File (.pst) format.

steps.heading: Include subfolders
steps.body: Highlight your root account node and check the "Include subfolders" option so nothing gets left behind.

steps.heading: Use the new Outlook path if applicable
steps.body: In the modern interface, go to Settings, then Files, and select Export instead.

steps.heading: Save and finish
steps.body: Choose your save location, assign a file name, and click Finish to complete the export.

faq.question: Why do I need to change my sync slider before exporting?
faq.answer: If your slider only syncs recent mail, older messages may not be locally cached, so switching it to "All" ensures a complete export.

faq.question: What's the difference between the classic and new Outlook export paths?
faq.answer: The classic interface uses the Import/Export wizard from the File menu, while the new Outlook handles it through Settings and Files instead.

faq.question: Can I open a PST file on a different computer?
faq.answer: Yes, a PST file can be imported into Outlook on another machine to restore your full mailbox history.

faq.question: Will duplicate emails cause issues during export?
faq.answer: Outlook includes duplicate item management options during export and import to help handle overlapping or redundant messages.
